seoTitle: Andover vs Antill Ponds — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Andover and Antill Ponds. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Andover vs Antill Ponds: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Andover and Antill Ponds.
heading: Andover vs Antill Ponds — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Andover, Tasmania and Antill Ponds, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Andover has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Antill Ponds (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Andover or Antill Ponds safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Andover has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Antill Ponds scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Andover scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Antill Ponds scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Andover or Antill Ponds?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Andover has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
